pdf_file: inputs/deepsearch/Immature Neuron Cell Types and Development Across Brain Regions.pdf

cite_traverse.node_context:
Three classical cell types in the adult dentate gyrus (DG) neurogenesis lineage:

1. dg_neuroblast — Dentate Gyrus Neuroblast (Type-3 Progenitor)
   Markers: DCX+, Ki67+, PSA-NCAM+ (type-2b: Nestin+/DCX+; type-3: DCX+ only)
   Negative markers: NeuN−, Calbindin−, GFAP−
   Location: subgranular zone (SGZ) of the dentate gyrus
   NT type: glutamatergic lineage (committed but not yet functional)
   Morphology: migratory progenitor; proliferative; last mitotic stage before differentiation
   Ephys: GAP — no characterisation available
   CL: CL:1000042 (forebrain neuroblast) — BROAD mapping
   Key gaps: electrophysiology, neuropeptides, species (mouse vs rat), subtype heterogeneity (type-2a/b/3)

2. dg_immature_granule_neuron — Dentate Gyrus Immature Granule Neuron
   Markers: DCX+, NeuN+, PSA-NCAM+, Tis21+
   Negative markers: Calbindin−
   Location: inner granule cell layer (GCL)
   NT type: glutamatergic
   Morphology: postmitotic stage-5 neuron; axons reach CA3 by day 10-11; spine growth over weeks
   Ephys: PARTIAL — synaptically integrating, entorhinal cortex glutamatergic input; intrinsic properties not characterised
   CL: no term — CANDIDATE (potential child of CL:2000089)
   Key gaps: intrinsic electrophysiology, neuropeptides, species confirmation

3. dg_mature_granule_neuron — Dentate Gyrus Mature Granule Neuron
   Markers: Calbindin+, NeuN+, Tbr1+
   Negative markers: DCX−, Nestin−, PSA-NCAM−
   Location: granule cell layer (GCL)
   NT type: glutamatergic
   Morphology: terminally differentiated (stage 6); fully elaborated dendritic arbor; mossy fiber projections to CA3
   Ephys: PARTIAL — fully synaptically integrated; intrinsic properties not characterised
   CL: CL:2000089 (dentate gyrus granule cell) — EXACT mapping
   Key gaps: intrinsic electrophysiology, neuropeptides

Priority round-2 targets: dg_neuroblast ephys GAP (patch-clamp SGZ neuroblasts), dg_neuroblast nt_type ambiguity (VGluT expression), dg_neuroblast HETEROGENEITY (type-2a/b/3), dg_immature_granule_neuron ephys GAP (Esposito et al. 2005, Ge et al. 2006), dg_mature_granule_neuron ephys GAP, neuropeptides in DG neurogenesis lineage, species disambiguation.
